# /document

> Post-implement reconcile. Updates `fdd.md`, `tdd.md`, `blueprint.md`, and task cards to reflect what was actually built — including artefact paths, schema names, plugin step registrations, and any technical drift from the originally specified design.

## Usage

```
/document [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/output/**` (artefacts produced by `/implement --complete`)
- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/{fdd,tdd,blueprint}.md` (domain docs to reconcile)
- `projects/{p}/d365-ce/features/{f}/tasks/*.task.md` (task implementation-status frontmatter)

## Execution flow

1. Resolve feature; assert `IMPLEMENTED` is in `currentStates`.
2. For each artefact under `output/`:
   - Parse artefact metadata (e.g., plugin .cs files for class names + registration, JS modules for namespace, PCF manifest for control IDs)
   - Cross-reference against TDD §customisation inventory rows tagged with this feature-id
   - Update TDD row: `actual-schema-name`, `actual-step-id`, `actual-artefact-path`
   - Update FDD §10 Handoffs if any cross-agent dependency was resolved differently than designed
   - Update blueprint C4-L3 if any component was renamed / split
3. Append to FDD §11 Implementation Log subsection a per-feature entry with implementation date + key decisions made during build.
4. Mark task cards with `documentation-status: done`.
5. Run `doc_lint` across all updated docs.
6. Update `.workflow.json`: `currentStates` += `DOCUMENTED`; remove `IMPLEMENTED`.

## Output

- Updated `fdd.md`, `tdd.md`, `blueprint.md` (additive at row level for the current feature)
- Updated task cards
- `.workflow.json` updated
